title: Circle Geometry Games
subtitle: Master circle theorems through interactive challenges

game1.title: Angle Calculator Challenge
game1.desc: Find the missing angle using circle theorems
game1.question: Question

theorems.centre_angle_desc: The angle at the centre is twice the angle at the circumference
theorems.same_segment_desc: Angles subtended by the same arc in the same segment are equal
theorems.semicircle_desc: The angle in a semicircle is always 90°
theorems.cyclic_quad_desc: Opposite angles in a cyclic quadrilateral sum to 180°
theorems.tangent_radius_desc: A tangent to a circle is perpendicular to the radius at the point of contact
theorems.tangent_lengths_desc: Tangent segments from an external point are equal in length

game2.title: Theorem Matcher
game2.desc: Match each diagram to the correct theorem name
game2.instructions: Drag theorem names on the right to match with the diagrams on the left
game2.instructionsMobile: Tap a diagram, then tap its matching theorem name

names.same_segment: Angles in Same Segment Are Equal

game3.title: Circle Constructor
game3.desc: Build geometric constructions on the circle
game3.instructions: Click on the circle to place points and construct the required figure

challenges.inscribed_angle: Mark an inscribed angle (3 points on the circle)
challenges.diameter: Draw a diameter (2 points through the centre)
challenges.semicircle_angle: Construct a right angle in a semicircle (place the angle vertex on the circle)
challenges.tangent_point: Mark the point where a tangent touches the circle
challenges.chord: Draw a chord (2 points on the circle, not through centre)
challenges.cyclic_quad: Construct a cyclic quadrilateral (4 points on the circle)

hints.inscribed_angle: Click 3 points on the circumference. The middle point is the vertex of the angle.
hints.diameter: Click 2 points on opposite sides of the circle, passing through the centre.
hints.semicircle_angle: First place 2 endpoints of a diameter, then a third point on the semicircle.
hints.tangent_point: Click a single point on the circumference where the tangent line touches.
hints.chord: Click 2 points on the circle. Make sure the line doesn't pass through the centre.
hints.cyclic_quad: Place 4 points on the circle in order to form a quadrilateral.
